title: Core tool parity: TodoWrite, AskUserQuestion, NotebookEdit, WebSearch
description:
Claude Code has 40+ tools; OC covers ~14. Four high-impact ones are trivially buildable and used in every session:

## Tools to add
- **TodoWrite** - in-conversation todo list (user-visible)
- **AskUserQuestion** - structured multi-choice prompt (used by /remember, /compact)
- **NotebookEdit** - .ipynb cell edit/insert/delete (maps to existing read/edit infrastructure)
- **WebSearch** - keyword search (distinct from existing web_fetch)

## Scope
- Add tool definitions in src/tools/mod.rs
- Wire into pipeline get_all_tool_definitions()
- Add per-tool module under src/tools/
- Cover with unit tests

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/tools/TodoTool/
- /home/doll/claude-code/tools/AskUserQuestionTool/
- /home/doll/claude-code/tools/NotebookEditTool/
